docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,911.37 FILED BY GRAY, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT LAPERA, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "CASE CONTINUED NOVEMBER 14, 2012 AT 10:00AM FOR TRIAL OR COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 116.390 (A)", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAPERA, JOSEPH

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAY, PHILIP ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT LAPERA, JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAY, PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAPERA, JOSEPH $5,911.37 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,911.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($0.00 WAIVED) SERVED AUG-30-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAPERA, JOSEPH
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO JOSEPH LAPERA.
